Argent Defender  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 49
DMG: 33 Dmg Bonus: 165
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
MANA: +20 ENDUR: +20
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

▲ Page top
Just got one
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2003 at 12:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794505832
31 posts
I just got one for 200pp on veeshan server. At lvl 20 I hit for about 60pts of damage. Its kinda slow though cause I have no haste item and can't afford one yet, maybe one day.. Btw the pic on the item is wrong, its probably an old pic, it has a similar logo like the sword of skyfire. The stats are still correct though.
▲ Page top
Aggro and Taunt
QuoteReply
# Jul 28 2003 at 10:28 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760292703
39 posts
The Argent is my first Really Hard hitter... and at lvl 29, I hit regularly in the 70's with it.. the FBSS helps with the delay... BUT I'm pulling Taunt from EVERY WARRIOR that I've grouped with including a "Twinked" Gnome that was 4 levels higher than me.....! When I switch back to my GhoulBane and Tsunami shield I loose the taunt...
It's gotta be the weapon! BTW My hardest strike to date is 97 according to my log parser! Why would anyone wanna be anything but a Pally... We have so Damn Much Fun!
▲ Page top
Comments on the Argent
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 9:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255066634
View User Forum
Scholar
59 posts
Well, on Seventh Hammer, the bazaar has driven prices way down, and I have been getting items much cheaper than I previously thought imaginable. I got this for 350pp a few days back from a PC in the bazaar. A few days later I got an Arbitors and have been using that instead. Hits for slightly less, but quicker. The Argent is good hitwise, but very slow. At 37 I was regularly hitting in the 90s and 100s.
▲ Page top
picked one of these up the other day
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2002 at 11:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249055540
18 posts
I bought one of these in the bazaar the other day for my pally alt for 150pp its a pretty decent weapon but a little slow highest hit i've seen with it so far is 77 at lvl 23 with 137 str which isnt too bad and it looks a hell of alot better then the babs i was carryin around thats for sure

I have goten one of these for A shimmering orb, and a Dragoon Dirk. I cant use it so I am looking to sale it. I would like to get atleast 2k for it. But I will also trade for Chanter stuff. If you are interested send me a tell I am Zeif on Fenen-ro. I am usally on after 9p.m. EST.

Damage
QuoteReply
# May 13 2002 at 12:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777656217
View User Forum
5 posts
Well, I was lucky to get this sword from a great friend. He is sort of regretting it right now, because he didn't get to really try it out first. If anyone has one for sell on the Mithaniel Marr server please get a hold of him. He goes by the following names:
Bayleaf
Kluuk
Glendarr
Sludgepot
Looter
silentfists

I just got a new spell called Instrument of Nife. It makes my weapon proc against the undead for 243 pts of damage. I am a lvl 30 paly hitting for average of 80 to 90 pts and getting single blows up to at this point for 105. If your a paly you'll eventually get a haste spell for 25% that will turn this bad boy into a 33 37 killing machine. I hope you all have as good a luck with yours as I have had with mine. Atlis 30 Paladin.
